UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: User account information, grand totals of debt, and preferences.

uid.description: Unique user ID matching Auth uid.

totalGet.description: Total amount the user is owed.

Friend.title: Friend
Friend.description: A contact (friend or family) with ledger record of debts.

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns this ledger entry.

balance.description: Current balance: positive code indicates owed to user, negative indicates user owes friend.

lastUpdate.description: Timestamp of the last transaction or activity.

lastActivityText.description: Short description of the last activity.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Ledger entry for friend debts or personal entries.

ownerId.description: UID of the user who logged this transaction.

friendId.description: ID of the associated friend, or empty if personal cashbook.

type.description: Role of cash movement: gave (outflow/debt debit), got (inflow/credit).

category.description: Category tag: Coffee, Lunch, Rent, Travel, etc.

/users/{userId}/friends/{friendId}.description: Subcollection of friends details managed by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/transactions/{transactio.description: Subcollection of transactions logged by a specific user.
